The scoreboard shows the team with the duck logo leading 3 to 0.
The game clock reads 10:18 in the 1st period.

spatial: The hockey goal net is to the left of the goalie. The goalie is lying on the ice below the standing hockey player. The broadcast overlay is at the bottom of the frame, below the action on the ice.
state_changes: Goalie is shown lying on ice in the crease; scene transitions to end sequence.

visible_entities.desc: ice hockey goaltender wearing a green jersey with red and black stripes on the sleeves, and a custom-painted goalie mask featuring a bird design with yellow, brown, and purple colors.

atomic_facts.fact: The goaltender is looking forward.
The scoreboard displays a score of 3 to 0.
The game clock shows 10:18 remaining in the 1st period.
The Anaheim Ducks logo is visible on the scoreboard next to the score 3.
The Arizona Coyotes logo is visible on the scoreboard next to the score 0.

spatial: The goaltender is in the foreground, centered in the frame. The out-of-focus player is behind and to the left of the goaltender. The scoreboard overlay is at the bottom of the screen, below the players.

spatial: The hockey goalie is positioned in the center of the frame, in front of the white ice background. The scoreboard overlay is located at the bottom of the screen, below the goalie. The 'SN UNITED BY SPORT' logo appears on a white background that fills the screen in the second frame.
